Interface IRasterSdeStorage

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control RasterSDE storage.

[Guid("B4153F6E-FE14-11D3-B2BF-00C04F8EDEFF")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterSdeStorage
